title: custom splash text
description:
a resource pack that changes the splash text.
yup thats it, sorry if you wanted more from this resource pack.
body:
just a resource pack for custom splash text. it just makes the text funny i guess? maybe adds some personality? if you download this thanks alot too!
thanks to snowy2_0 and damocles711 for adding some text. you can add them on discord if you want to for some reason. if you want to add some text just dm ndpsoc on discord (woah thats me) and ill put it in. just dont make it way too inappropriate. ill add some images when i can figure out how to make the file smaller (im not very smart. also the resource pack has some curse words.)
